current.clickhouse:
WITH
    session_max AS (SELECT
            nullIf(nullIf(events.`mat_$pathname`, ''), 'null') AS path,
            nullIf(nullIf(events.`$session_id`, ''), 'null') AS sess,
            max(accurateCastOrNull(accurateCastOrNull(has(events.properties_group_custom, %(hogql_val_0)s) ? events.properties_group_custom[%(hogql_val_0)s] : null, %(hogql_val_1)s), %(hogql_val_2)s)) AS max_sec
        FROM
            events
        WHERE
            and(equals(events.team_id, 275753), equals(events.event, %(hogql_val_3)s), isNotNull(nullIf(nullIf(events.`mat_$pathname`, ''), 'null')), isNotNull(nullIf(nullIf(events.`$session_id`, ''), 'null')), greaterOrEquals(toDate(toTimeZone(events.timestamp, %(hogql_val_4)s)), toDateOrNull(%(hogql_val_5)s)), lessOrEquals(toDate(toTimeZone(events.timestamp, %(hogql_val_6)s)), toDateOrNull(%(hogql_val_7)s)))
        GROUP BY
            path,
            sess)
SELECT
    session_max.path AS path,
    quantile(0.5)(session_max.max_sec) AS median_sec,
    count() AS n
FROM
    session_max
GROUP BY
    session_max.path
HAVING
    ifNull(greaterOrEquals(n, 3), 0)
ORDER BY
    n DESC
LIMIT 40 SETTINGS readonly=2, max_execution_time=10, max_threads=60, allow_experimental_object_type=1, max_ast_elements=4000000, max_expanded_ast_elements=4000000, max_bytes_before_external_group_by=0, enable_analyzer=1, transform_null_in=1, optimize_min_equality_disjunction_chain_length=4294967295, allow_experimental_join_condition=1, use_hive_partitioning=0
current.hogql:
WITH
    session_max AS (SELECT
            properties.$pathname AS path,
            properties.$session_id AS sess,
            max(toFloat(properties.milestone_seconds)) AS max_sec
        FROM
            events
        WHERE
            and(equals(event, 'time_on_page_milestone'), notEquals(properties.$pathname, NULL), notEquals(properties.$session_id, NULL), greaterOrEquals(toDate(timestamp), toDate('2026-04-29')), lessOrEquals(toDate(timestamp), toDate('2026-05-12')))
        GROUP BY
            path,
            sess)
SELECT
    path,
    quantile(0.5)(max_sec) AS median_sec,
    count() AS n
FROM
    session_max
GROUP BY
    path
HAVING
    greaterOrEquals(n, 3)
ORDER BY
    n DESC
LIMIT 40

WITH
    session_max AS (SELECT
            properties.$pathname AS path,
            properties.$session_id AS sess,
            max(toFloat(properties.milestone_seconds)) AS max_sec
        FROM
            events
        WHERE
            and(equals(event, 'time_on_page_milestone'), notEquals(properties.$pathname, NULL), notEquals(properties.$session_id, NULL), greaterOrEquals(toDate(timestamp), toDate('2026-04-15')), lessOrEquals(toDate(timestamp), toDate('2026-04-28')), notEquals(toDate(timestamp), toDate('2026-04-17')), notEquals(toDate(timestamp), toDate('2026-04-19')), notEquals(toDate(timestamp), toDate('2026-04-20')))
        GROUP BY
            path,
            sess)
SELECT
    path,
    quantile(0.5)(max_sec) AS median_sec,
    count() AS n
FROM
    session_max
GROUP BY
    path
HAVING
    greaterOrEquals(n, 3)
ORDER BY
    n DESC
LIMIT 40
